_note: Somali bundle is a scaffold for the pilot. Safety-critical strings and the appointment / follow-up flow are translated; remaining base UI still falls back to English.

pilot.notice: Tijaabo. Lama xidhiidhsana NHS. Wax aan tallaabadaada lahayn lama wadaago.

home.appointmentBody: U diyaargarow booqashadaada xigta ee GP. Waxaan diiwaan-gelin doonnaa waxaad rabto inaad sheegto erayadaada gaarka ah waxaanan u tarjumi doonnaa dhakhtarka.

ai.generatedBanner: Waxa sameeyay AI. Tarjumaadda iyo soo-koobiddu way khaldami karaan. Erayadaada asalka ah waa lagu hayaa dhinaca.

appointment.title: U diyaargarowga ballanta GP
appointment.intro: Mar walba ka jawaab hal su'aal oo gaaban. Iska dhaaf waxaad jeclaan lahayd inaadan ka jawaabin. Erayadaada asalka ah waa lagu hayaa sida aad u qortay.
appointment.reviewIntro: Laba soo-koobid ayaa jawaabahaaga laga sameeyay: mid luuqad fudud kuu yeer adiga, mid kale oo qaab habaysan u ah dhakhtarka. Labaduba waa AI; midkaaga waa wax ka beddeli kartaa.
appointment.editedByYou: Adiga ayaa wax ka beddelay nuqulkan.

q.mainConcern: Waa maxay shayga ugu muhiimsan ee aad maanta caawimaad u rabto?
q.mainConcernBody: Ku qor luuqaddaada. Isticmaal eray badan ama yar sida aad rabto.
q.symptomDuration: Intee in le'eg ayey arrintani socotay?
q.painLevel: Hadda xanuun ma qabtaa? Haddii haa, intee?
q.allergies: Cilad xasaasiyad ah oo dhakhtarku ogaado?
q.sleep: Sidee ayaa hurdadaadu hadda u tahay?
q.appetite: Sidee ayaa cuntaynta hadda kuu tahay?
q.mentalHealth: Wax ku saabsan sida aad maskaxda u dareemayso oo aad rabto in dhakhtarku ogaado?
q.mentalHealthBody: Ku qor erayadaada. Safeguard waxba ma cilminayo — kaliya wuxuu gudbinayaa waxa aad sheegto.
q.safeguarding: Wax ku saabsan badbaadadaada meesha aad ku noolahay oo aad rabto in dhakhtarku ogaado?
q.safeguardingBody: Ku qor erayadaada. Safeguard cidna kuuma soo wici doono — kaliya dhakhtarka aad la wadaagto ayaa arki doona.

translateWs.title: Goobta tarjumaadda
translateWs.aiBanner: Tarjumaad AI oo toos ah. Heerka kalsoonida ayaa loo muujiyaa sadar walba. Erayadaada asalka ah marwalba ayaa la muujiyaa tarjumaadda dhinaceeda. U sheeg dhakhtarka haddii wax khaldan u eg yihiin.
translateWs.inputLabel: Qor waxa lagu yidhi {{from}} ← u tarjun {{to}}
translateWs.inputPlaceholder: Mar walba qor ama ku dheji hal sadar.
translateWs.empty: Tarjumaad weli ma jirto. Dooro qofka hadlaya oo qor sadar.

pdf.heading: PDF u ah GP
pdf.body: Samee soo-koobid hal bog ah oo aad siin karto dhakhtarka (ama u dirto GP-gaaga iimaylkii). Waxay ka kooban tahay labada soo-koobidood, jawaabahaagii saxda ahaa, iyo isbeddelka diiwaanka aad ugu dambeyn samaysay.

followup.title: Xusuusin iyo raac-raac
followup.intro: Waxa dhakhtarku kaa codsaday inaad sameyso, luuqaddaada. Taabo xusuusin si aad u calaamadiso in la sameeyay. Qoraalladaada asalka ah marwalba waa la hayaa.
followup.captureBody: Ku dheji ama ku qor tilmaamaha dhakhtarka sida ay yihiin. Safeguard wuu tarjumi doonaa wuxuuna kuu beddeli doonaa xusuusin.
followup.placeholder: Tusaale: Qaado amoxicillin 500mg saddex jeer maalintii muddo 5 maalmood ah. Ku noqo laba toddobaad gudahood. Ka soo noqo si dhakhso ah haddii qandhadu sii xumaato.
followup.showOriginal: Muuji erayada asalka ah ee dhakhtarka

kind.escalation: Ku noqo haddii xaaladdu sii xumaato

support.title: Haddii aad hadda u baahantahay caawimaad
support.intro: Safeguard ma aha adeeg caafimaad. Haddii aad hadda u baahantahay caawimaad, fadlan la xidhiidh kuwan.

nhs111.name: NHS 111
nhs111.what: Khadka talo-bixinta caafimaad ee bilaashka ah ee UK, 24 saac.

samaritans.name: Samaritans
samaritans.what: Khad sirta ah oo dhageysiga, 24 saac.
